description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The exterior is primarily finished in a light beige or off-white color, with some sections accented by muted brown and tan tones. Large, vertically oriented windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a driveway or road access, a landscaped area with circular greenery, and several outdoor patios or terraces. The main entryway is set back and partially sheltered, with steps leading up to the door. The overall layout suggests a spacious, multi-level residence with a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, asymmetrical windows, and landscaped outdoor areas, finished in light beige and tan tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, central structure, and a circular landscaped area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat roof, multiple rectangular volumes, and the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals additional outdoor patios, terraces, and the back facade with more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the circular greenery, secondary entry points, and the overall depth of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, partially sheltered, minimalistic door, and no prominent decorative elements.
